sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Rattle Attack
special_mechanics.description: Main character Upa uses a rattle to attack enemies. When struck, enemies inflate and float away, becoming temporary platforms or movable projectiles.

special_mechanics.name: Inflated Enemy Platform Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Inflated enemies serve as temporary floating platforms. If Upa remains on them too long, they explode. Can also be pushed/used as weapons to ricochet off objects.

special_mechanics.name: Temporary Invincibility
special_mechanics.description: Bell items grant Upa temporary invincibility and the ability to run.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - No precise physics values documented in TCRF or Wikipedia sources. Data focuses on gameplay mechanics and level design features rather than numerical movement parameters. Sources provide extensive game history, version differences, and mechanical descriptions but lack raw physics data (acceleration values, frame data, etc.).
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Bio Miracle Bokutte Upa
